_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.failed_password_attempts: 33354 total failed in fail2ban, 11 currently failed
ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 11 currently banned, 4892 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 4892 (up from 4793, +99). 11 IPs currently banned (up from 8). Active brute-force continues from 2.57.12x.x, 80.94.92.x, 45.148.10.x, and 92.118.39.x ranges. Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 101 usages across 41 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml() helper reads. color-adjust.js has 2 innerHTML (1 clearing, 1 static × entity).

color_adjust_module_review.feature: Brightness, contrast, saturation, grayscale, threshold B&W, invert color adjustments with split preview, histogram, custom presets, and page scope selection.
color_adjust_module_review.innerHTML_detail: Line 242: clearing container (innerHTML=''). Line 251: static HTML entity (innerHTML='×').
color_adjust_module_review.text_display: Preset labels via textContent. Progress text via textContent. Slider values are numeric from parseInt(). Custom preset names stored in localStorage, displayed via textContent only.
color_adjust_module_review.local_storage_usage: Custom presets saved to localStorage under 'colorAdjust_customPresets' key — JSON with numeric values and user-supplied label names. Labels displayed via textContent, not innerHTML.
color_adjust_module_review.error_handling: try/catch with showToast for user errors, isProcessing guard prevents concurrent operations

search_module_review_update.note: Re-reviewed after modification. All text output uses textContent. Match counter uses textContent. Highlight overlays created via createElement with className assignment only.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, and extract-images module downloads

xlsx_full_min_js.purpose: XLSX export for table extraction module

docx_umd_js.purpose: DOCX generation for PDF-to-Word export module

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js use escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (title/aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
notes: Full security review completed — 70 checks passed, 0 critical findings.

NEW: Reviewed color-adjust.js (TASK-042): 2 innerHTML (1 clearing, 1 static × entity — both safe). No eval/Function/document.write/window.open/fetch. Custom preset names displayed via textContent only. All pixel processing client-side on canvas. SECURE.
RE-REVIEWED: search.js modified — 0 innerHTML, all DOM via createElement+textContent. SECURE.
innerHTML count: 101 across 41 JS files (up 2 from 99 — both new from color-adjust.js, both safe).
41 JS files in webroot (up 1 from 40 — color-adjust.js added).

SSH: fail2ban total bans 4892 (+99 since last review). 11 IPs currently banned (up from 8). Continued brute-force from 2.57.12x.x, 80.94.92.x, 45.148.10.x, 92.118.39.x ranges. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (76 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified. Config syntax OK.
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
